# unstructured_workflow (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing workflow.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "unstructured_workflow" "example" {
  id = "existing-workflow-uuid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the workflow.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the workflow was created.
- `destination_id` (String) The ID of the destination connector.
- `name` (String) The name of the workflow.
- `reprocess_all` (Boolean) Whether all documents are reprocessed on each run.
- `schedule` (String) The cron schedule expression for the workflow.
- `source_id` (String) The ID of the source connector.
- `status` (String) The current status of the workflow.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the workflow was last updated.
- `workflow_nodes` (String) A JSON-encoded array of workflow node definitions.
- `workflow_type` (String) The type of workflow (`basic`, `advanced`, `platinum`, or `custom`).
